title: Bring Gemini’s intelligence to AlloyDB using AI functions
summary: AlloyDB introduces AI functions that integrate Gemini directly into SQL workflows. Functions include ai.generate, ai.rank, ai.if, ai.forecast, ai.summarize, ai.agg_summarize, and ai.analyze_sentiment. The optimized implementation provides significant performance improvements and cost reduction compared to row-at-a-time LLM calls.
writeup: This video covers AlloyDB's new AI functions, which embed Gemini into SQL workflows so model calls run inside the database. The set includes ai.generate, ai.rank, ai.if, ai.forecast, ai.summarize, ai.agg_summarize, and ai.analyze_sentiment, covering generation, ranking, conditional logic, forecasting, summarization, and sentiment analysis. The implementation is optimized to deliver performance gains and cost reduction relative to row-at-a-time LLM calls. The relevance lies in moving inference next to the data rather than issuing per-row external requests.
